name: 身份懸念鉤子
description: 女主擁有雙重秘密身份——既是被害千金的轉世，又是擁有神力的古代女神。觀眾知道她的真實力量但劇中角色不知，這種信息不對稱持續製造張力，讓觀眾期待每一次身份差點暴露或主動揭露的時刻。

examples.drama_title: Revenge of the Reborn Heiress: Disowned, I Awakened My Divine Power & Bankrupted My Family Overnight
examples.excerpt: Using her secret identity and supernatural powers, she crushes her enemies

examples.drama_title: 姨母為她相看的未來夫君被表妹搶了先，她不爭不搶不哭不鬧默默將渣男拱手相讓，人人都等着看她被退親的笑話，不料等着等着卻等到那位風光霽月的小世子十里紅妝高調求娶，給了她一世榮寵！#古装言情 #重生复仇
examples.excerpt: I'm just an orphan he rescued. After so many years. He should have forgotten.

examples.drama_title: 👑Reborn, She Regained Her Identity as the Richest Daughter, the Scumbag Girl Knelt Down Before Her!
examples.excerpt: （字幕資料不足，基於標題推斷）'She Regained Her Identity as the Richest Daughter' 表明身份回歸是核心懸念線，貫穿全劇。

examples.drama_title: 新劇搶先看【君心照月白】他曾在她最動情時，涼薄告知要娶白月光。當她被正妃當作玩物、被他像送禮物般推出……心死孤女徹底消失。寧王瘋魔悔恨——她已被帝王視若珍寶。
examples.excerpt: 十八年前，沈醫世家覆滅了。他的小女兒，是沈瑟拉菲娜。她失踪了。你是說……？是我？正是。你是沈家失蹤的孤兒

examples.drama_title: On her first day, the cleaning girl defied the CEO, expecting to be fired—but he proposed to her!
examples.excerpt: I'm trying to save her. The country's top shme medical cosmetics lab and you don't even know about lead poisoning. Do you guys even deserve to call yourselves dermacosmetic spec? / Most importantly, I have the guts to use it myself.
